source: KMP fake-transport command-capture planning and shared ScriptedCommonFakeTransport prototype
description: Pins deterministic command ordering, payload capture, and scripted transport outcomes before request/write/stream command planning moves into shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Shared fake transport must capture request order, write payload bytes, stream subscription targets, and scripted success/error/complete outcomes deterministically before runtime command planning delegates to KMP.

notes: This vector covers the shared fake-transport command contract only. Public facade request success, response-error mapping, transport-error mapping, and stream error mapping remain feature-specific migration gates.
